system.description:
The psyker wraps a target in crushing bands of force. Opposed Test pitting Willpower vs. the target's Toughness. If the psyker wins, deals 1d10 Impact Damage + 1 per Psy Rating. The psyker may also Grapple the opponent, substituting his Willpower Bonus for Strength Bonus.

Focus Power Test: Opposed Willpower vs. Toughness

XP Cost: 200
